rooms.name: Office
rooms.description: A detective office littered with notes and a locked drawer.

interactables.label: Read desk note
interactables.message: The note reads: 'The brass key is taped beneath the lamp.'

interactables.label: Take brass key
interactables.message: You peel the brass key from beneath the lamp.

interactables.label: Unlock drawer
interactables.successMessage: The drawer clicks open, revealing a coded card.

interactables.label: Take coded card
interactables.message: You take the coded card marked '4421'.

rooms.name: Hallway
rooms.description: The hallway terminal controls the archive vault door.

interactables.label: Talk to janitor
lines: The janitor mutters: 'The terminal only accepts a card and a code.'
The janitor shrugs: 'Try what is written on the card.'

interactables.label: Use hallway terminal
interactables.successMessage: Access granted. The archive vault opens.
interactables.failMessage: The terminal requests a valid access card.

rooms.name: Archive
rooms.description: Rows of filing cabinets surround a final evidence locker.

interactables.label: Open evidence locker
interactables.successMessage: You recover the case file. Mystery solved.
interactables.failMessage: The locker needs the correct access card.
